introSection: Fire in the Hole is a steel enclosed roller coaster located at Silver Dollar City in Branson, Missouri, USA. The ride is an updated version of Fire in the Hole, which closed at the end of 2023.
fullText: Fire in the Hole is a steel enclosed roller coaster located at Silver Dollar City in Branson, Missouri, USA. The ride is an updated version of Fire in the Hole, which closed at the end of 2023.
